description: Real-time monitoring for the Gentis pub/sub messaging engine

panels.description: Instantaneous rate of messages published, delivered, and dropped per second by mode.
panels.title: Message Rate by Mode

panels.description: Cumulative total of messages published and delivered over time.
panels.title: Cumulative Messages

panels.title: Publish Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Fan-out distribution: how many subscribers each publish reaches (p50, p90, p99).
panels.title: Fan-out Distribution

panels.description: Published vs Delivered stacked bar chart.
panels.title: Throughput Stacked

panels.description: Data throughput in bytes per second by mode.
panels.title: Data Throughput

panels.description: Active connections over time broken down by mode.
panels.title: Active Connections Over Time

panels.description: Rate of new connections and disconnections per second.
panels.title: Connection Churn Rate

panels.description: Subscribe and unsubscribe operation rates per second.
panels.title: Subscription Ops Rate

panels.description: Active channels and total subscriptions over time with dual axes.
panels.title: Channels & Subscriptions

panels.description: Subscriptions per connection ratio by mode.
panels.title: Fan-out Ratio

panels.description: Average subscriptions per channel.
panels.title: Avg Subscriptions per Channel

panels.description: Distribution of connections by mode.
panels.title: Mode Distribution

panels.description: Percentage of published messages successfully delivered. Drops below 95% should be investigated.
panels.title: Message Delivery Rate (%)

panels.description: Percentage of published messages dropped. Spikes above 5% trigger the critical threshold.
panels.title: Message Drop Rate (%)

panels.description: Instantaneous drop rate over time.
panels.title: Messages Dropped Rate

panels.description: Overall system health based on delivery rate.
panels.title: System Health Score

panels.description: Drop events per minute timeline.
panels.title: Drop Events Timeline

panels.description: Whether the relay is connected to its upstream server.
panels.title: Upstream Status

panels.description: Deduplication: duplicates blocked vs unique messages passed per second.
panels.title: Dedup Hit Rate

panels.description: Relay vs Server message throughput comparison.
panels.title: Relay vs Server Throughput

panels.description: Dedup efficiency: percentage of messages that were duplicates.
panels.title: Dedup Efficiency

panels.description: Connections and subscriptions per mode as horizontal bars.
panels.title: Per-Mode Resource Bar

panels.description: Relay fan-out amplification: delivered messages per published message.
panels.title: Relay Fan-out Amplification

panels.description: Total active connections gauge.

panels.description: Active subscriptions gauge.

panels.description: Goroutines per active connection.
